tests.name: test_lp01_lhdn_cp21_accessible
tests.description: LP-01: LHDN CP21 doctype is accessible via REST.

tests.name: test_lp02_lhdn_cp22_accessible
tests.description: LP-02: LHDN CP22 doctype is accessible via REST.

tests.name: test_lp03_lhdn_cp22a_accessible
tests.description: LP-03: LHDN CP22A doctype is accessible via REST.

tests.name: test_lp04_lhdn_msic_code_has_data
tests.description: LP-04: LHDN MSIC Code master has at least 1 record (fixtures loaded).

tests.name: test_lp05_lhdn_resubmission_log_accessible
tests.description: LP-05: LHDN Resubmission Log doctype is accessible.

tests.name: test_lp16_lhdn_payroll_compliance_report
tests.description: LP-16: 'LHDN Payroll Compliance' report doctype exists.

tests.name: test_lp17_ea_form_report_exists
tests.description: LP-17: 'EA Form' report is defined in the system.

tests.name: test_lp18_lhdn_monthly_summary_accessible
tests.description: LP-18: LHDN Monthly Summary report can be called.

tests.name: test_lp19_lhdn_workspace_exists
tests.description: LP-19: 'LHDN Payroll' workspace is in the system.

tests.name: test_lp20_dev_tools_page_accessible
tests.description: LP-20: LHDN Dev Tools desk page is accessible.

tests.name: test_lp12_salary_components_loaded
tests.description: LP-12: Salary Component list is accessible and non-empty.

tests.name: test_lp13_epf_component_exists
tests.description: LP-13: 'EPF' salary component exists (from fixtures).

tests.name: test_lp14_socso_component_exists
tests.description: LP-14: 'SOCSO' salary component exists.

tests.name: test_lp15_pcb_component_exists
tests.description: LP-15: 'PCB' or 'Tax' salary component exists.

tests.name: test_lp06_salary_slip_meta_accessible
tests.description: LP-06: Salary Slip custom fields are queryable via REST.
